privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco parcel, building, and household data from the official UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5). It was verified via script analysis and direct Python querying that the required data structures exist within the HDF5 tables, and running the query successfully identifies 132 zones containing at least 20 large single-family homes. The export_result.sh script strictly expects the analysis notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/sfh_underutilization.ipynb, the CSV output at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/underutilized_zones.csv, and the plot image at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/underutilization_plot.png. Furthermore, the verifier.py logic explicitly requires the four target CSV columns: zone_id, total_large_sfh, underutilized_sfh, and underutilization_rate.
